METRIC_INFO.Return: Total return for the period: (Ending Value / Starting Value) - 1
METRIC_INFO.Sharpe Ratio: Risk-adjusted return: (Average annual return) / Annual volatility
METRIC_INFO.Volatility: Standard deviation of daily returns, annualized × √252
METRIC_INFO.Max Drawdown: Maximum peak-to-trough decline: min((Value - Peak) / Peak)
METRIC_INFO.Calmar Ratio: Total return / |Max Drawdown|. Measures return per unit of drawdown risk
